message:
fix(ci): update metal0 submodule URL and add submodule checkout

- Install libbz2-dev and liblzma-dev on Linux for metal0 build
- Only build metal0 target (faster CI)

files.patch:
@@ -39,10 +39,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Install system dependencies (Linux)
+        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libbz2-dev liblzma-dev
+
       - name: Build metal0 compiler
         run: |
           cd deps/metal0
-          zig build
+          zig build metal0
           echo "$PWD/zig-out/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
 
       - name: Build Zig shared library
